# Operational Readiness Checklist

Use this checklist before launching a new service, major feature, or high-risk change.

## Service basics

- [ ] Ownership is defined
- [ ] Service metadata and dependencies are documented
- [ ] Runbook link is available

## Reliability and operations

- [ ] SLOs and alerts are defined
- [ ] Dashboards are available and reviewed
- [ ] Capacity assumptions are documented
- [ ] Rollback path is tested

## Security and compliance

- [ ] Security review was completed for applicable risk level
- [ ] Vulnerability scanning is enabled
- [ ] Compliance controls are addressed where required

## Release safety

- [ ] Deployment strategy is defined (progressive, canary, blue-green, etc.)
- [ ] Blast-radius controls are in place
- [ ] Stakeholders are informed of rollout plan

## Support readiness

- [ ] On-call path is documented
- [ ] Escalation contacts are current
- [ ] Support guidance is prepared for customer-impacting changes

## Sign-off

- [ ] Engineering owner
- [ ] Product owner
- [ ] Operations/SRE reviewer (if applicable)
